passive.name: Ashing
passive.description:
Valir's skills apply a stack of Ablaze to enemies hit, dealing them Magic Damage equal to 1 (+0.2% Total Magic Power)% of their Max HP per second for 3s.
At 3 stacks, the fire detonates, dealing Magic Damage equal to 5 (+1% Total Magic Power)% of the target's Max HP to the enemy and stunning them for 1s (the same target can only be stunned by Valir's skills once every 7s).

skill1.name: Burst Fireball
skill1.description:
Valir launches a fireball that explodes on the first target, dealing 235 (+80% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 30% for 1s. The lingering flame on the ground will explode after 1s, dealing 118 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage.
Valir recharges 1 fireball every 9s and can hold up to 2 fireball charges. Hitting an enemy hero or Legend Creep with this skill will immediately restore a fireball charge, while hitting a Minion will restore 4s of the recharge time.
Once enhanced by Vengeance Flame, the cast range of Burst Fireball increases by 30%
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=45/50/55/60/65/70
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=235/270/305/340/375/410
|stats3=Explosion Damage|stats3_value=118/135/153/170/188/205
|stats4=Skill Recharge Time|stats4_value=9/8.6/8.2/7.8/7.4/7

skill2.name: Searing Torrent
skill2.description:
Valir unleashes a torrent of flames in the target direction, dealing 200 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and knocking them to the end of its path.
Vengeance Flame: The torrent forms a firewall at the end of its path that lasts 4s and deals 100 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies per second.
Enemies hit by the torrent or the firewall are slowed by 25% for 1s.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=13.0/12.4/11.8/11.2/10.6/10.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=75/80/85/90/95/100
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=200/220/240/260/280/300
|stats4=Firewall Damage|stats4_value=100/110/120/130/140/150

ultimate.name: Vengeance Flame
ultimate.description:
Valir removes all existing debuffs on him, gains 40% Movement Speed that decays over 3s, and conjures 4 Vengeance Flames, enhancing Burst Fireball and Searing Torrent for 9s.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=36.0/33.0/30.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=100/125/150
